Description: Simultaneous updates by several controllers to the same NonAdminBackupStorageLocationRequest objects cause resource conflicts. No known workaround.

Summary: Self-signed certificate for internal image backup
Description: Before this update OADP would only process the first custom CA certificate. With this update multiple BSLs with different CA certificates work correctly.
The DataProtectionTest (DPT) CR provides a framework to validate your OADP configuration.
